document.title: MI97-04245C ASSY COVER-A2_REAR_COVER_ASSY
document.documentType: Supplier approval package with control plan, E-BOM, inspection sheets, work instruction, and packing specification

sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier approval and manufacturing quality documentation for Samsung part MI97-04245C, ASSY COVER-A2_REAR_COVER_ASSY for 2G detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports part approval, process control, outgoing inspection, assembly work instruction, and packing requirements for the rear cover assembly.
keyPoints: Material code and SEC part number are MI97-04245C for ASSY COVER-A2_REAR_COVER_ASSY.
Model is listed as 2G 디텍터 and vendor/supplier is 대일정공 / DAEIL PRECISION.
Approval checklist and outgoing inspection criteria require GAP, protrusion, magnet direction, Wi-Fi antenna condition, bonding, label, power knob, appearance, and weight checks.
REAR COVER ASSY weight limit is MAX 967.2 g, including protective film/Kapton tape where specified.
The part must not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.

reviewFlags.reason: Multiple dates appear in the source, including E.D DATE 2022-01-28, control plan Date(Orig.) 2022.02.04, E-BOM Printing Date 2022-02-07, work instruction 작성일 22.01.07, and recycling declaration 작성일 2021/07/13.
Multiple revision/version values appear: proposal Revision 00, EC History Rev. 00, file name V2, and work instruction Rev 2.
Authority signal is general; the source is supplier/customer documentation rather than a government regulatory approval.
Preprocessed spreadsheet text contains repeated sections, sparse table cells, and some OCR/extraction artifacts such as stray backticks and inconsistent part spellings.
